source: OSRS Wiki quest pages (per-quest research agents), CA-relevant quest universe
note: Quest-effort graph for the quests that gate Combat Achievements (gating quests + full prerequisite chains). estMinutes/effortScore are heuristics derived from the wiki Length/Difficulty so the plugin can compare doing a quest chain vs grinding a CA. directPrerequisiteQuests forms the dependency graph.
